context.projectOverview: Phase B Sprint 2: add the additive config/manifest surface + explicit child seam. Optional config.fleet section (child-visible channel; BoberConfigSchema strips unknown keys so it MUST be declared), optional manifest.blackboard block, resolveBlackboardPath (head-injected ABSOLUTE path), scaffolder injection per child, and a new `agent-bober blackboard publish|read` CLI. NO coordinator loop (Sprint 3) and NO synthesis (Sprint 4).

completedSprints.title: SharedBlackboard module (WAL facts.db wrapper)
completedSprints.summary: src/fleet/shared-blackboard.ts exports BLACKBOARD_MAX_ROUNDS=3, BlackboardFinding, and SharedBlackboard with static async open({dbPath,namespace,busyTimeoutMs?,maxRounds}), publish(finding,now) (throws when round>min(maxRounds,3)), readSiblings(selfFolder), readAll(), close(). FactStore (src/state/facts.ts) gained an optional 2nd constructor arg { journalModeWal?, busyTimeoutMs? } default-off. Commit e1d4b00. The CLI in THIS sprint uses SharedBlackboard.open().

relevantFiles: src/config/schema.ts (~:405-421 BoberConfigSchema; MedicalSectionSchema is the optional-section template)
src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — where resolveBlackboardPath is computed + threaded to scaffolder)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md — ESM .js imports, import type, Zod schemas in config/schema.ts (no hand-rolled validation), no SDK leak, node:fs/promises only, unicode section headers, conventional commits 'bober(sprint-2): ...'. CLI must read the absolute db path from config.fleet ONLY — never re-derive from cwd; no-fleet-section = clean exit 1 (printed), never throw; no-blackboard scaffolder output byte-identical (omit the fleet key).
